description: Open the draft soil analysis report at /home/ga/Documents/soil_analysis_draft.docx. Add automatic captions using the 'Figure' label to the three images: 'Soil Composition Analysis' for the pie chart, 'Acidity pH Levels' for the bar chart, and 'Sampling Locations Map' for the map. Replace the text placeholders (e.g., [REF_FIG_COMP]) with dynamic cross-references to these figures, inserting only the category and number. Insert a Table of Figures under the 'List of Figures' heading at the end of the document. Save the final document as /home/ga/Documents/soil_report_final.docx.
